_comment: Run state for durability + resume-via-recon. On relaunch: recon the committed state, re-verify the last claimed gate against the real repo, then continue from the first unmet gate. Worker subagents are hook-denied from writing this file.
run_target_this_session: Gate 0 (foundation), then hand back for one relaunch to ACTIVATE hooks before Phase 1 fan-out
deliberate_stop_point: Gate 6 (hackathon checkpoint) — bank-grade Phases 7-15 are a later relaunch

gates.name: Foundation + architecture validated

evidence.audit_substrate: packages/audit hash-chain + WORM store (8 tests pass incl. live DB WORM reject)
evidence.harness: vitest + biome + tsc configured; 26 tests passing
evidence.db: docker postgres up; operational + audit DBs migrated (ADR-013 separation, WORM trigger)
evidence.hooks: written + unit-verified correct; NOT active mid-session (require relaunch)

gates.blocker: Enforcement hooks are not active until a session relaunch. Foundation committed; operator relaunches to activate, then resume from this gate via recon before Phase 1 fan-out.

spend_note: Phase 0 foundation only this session. Depth-spend stance applies from Phase 1 onward.
next_action_on_relaunch: Recon committed state; probe hooks active (echo CROWN_HOOK_PROBE must be BLOCKED); re-verify Gate 0; then fan out Phase 1 (safe simulator + benign suite + metrics, main-thread oracle).
